title: Sales Account Executive / Manager
description:
We are seeking a dynamic and driven Sales Executive / Manager to join our team. This role focuses on developing new business opportunities, maintaining strong relationships with existing clients, and driving sales of Japanese food establishment. The candidate should have a proven ability to meet and exceed sales targets.

Key Responsibilities:

·         Manage and develop key accounts, particularly Japanese FMCG/food sector.

·       Develop and execute strategic sales plans to achieve revenue targets

·          To focus on business development – new customers and new projects.

·          Maintain and grow relationships with existing clients.

·          Manage end-to-end sales process, including leads generation, proposal development, contract negotiation, manage delivery timelines and post-sales support.

·          Coordinate with internal teams (marketing, logistics, product development) to meet client requirements.

·          Prepare quotations, negotiate contracts, and manage delivery timelines.

·          Provide regular sales reports, forecasts and performance updates to management.

·          Monitor market trends, competitor activities, and customer needs to identify opportunities.

Job Requirements:

·          Proven experience as a Sales Account Manager or similar role in FMCG/food industry.

·          Experience managing Japanese or retail customers is highly preferred.

·          Strong understanding of market dynamics, sales strategies, and account management.

·          Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.

·          Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

·          Proficient in MS Office; knowledge of CRM systems is a plus.

·          High level of professionalism and integrity.

postedCompany.description:
Hong Food Enterprise Pte Ltd is a well-established frozen seafood & product supplier to Singapore Hotels, Resorts and Restaurant-Chains. Founded since 1980, the HONGFOOD brand had built a reputation of quality & trustworthiness recognized by our partners, customers & Chefs of the F&B industries. Our seafood is sea-catch or freshly harvested from our all-natural certified farms. Our food factories are Internationally certified, meeting International food safety (HACCP), and product quality control standards (ISO 9001), including product traceability from farm to factory to distribution centers.


Our purpose: Provide excellent, ready-to-cook protein sources to satisfy the palettes that crave healthy and delicious seafood. We are spreading our fins and claws to share our treasure trove from the seas. We want everyone to have their seafood and eat it. Huge opportunities await as we swim further and deeper into the minds of seafood lovers, and we want to change the future of eating.


A strong advocate of sustainability, we practice responsible seafood culture. Having peace of mind and enjoying what’s on your plate is our promise. Our work is far from done. No effort is too small to make ourselves even better.


Come join in our mission.
postedCompany.name: HONG FOOD ENTERPRISE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
